message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 'R19584 KU1 - Knihovna'

class Library {
  o books : ArrayList<Book>
  o persons : ArrayList<Person>
  o borrowings : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  o StandardBorrowingPeriod : int
  --
  + Library()
  --
  + addBook(book : Book) : void
  + addPerson(person : Person) : void
  + addBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
  --
  + addBooks(books : ArrayList<Book>) : void
  + addPersons(persons : ArrayList<Person>) : void
  + addBorrowings(borrowings : ArrayList<Borrowing>) : void
  --
  + getBooks() : ArrayList<Book>
  + getPersons() : ArrayList<Person>
  + getBorrowings(book : Book) : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + getPenalties(person : Person) : ArrayList<Penalty>
  + penalizePerson(person : Person, penalty : Penalty) : void
  --
  + getAllBorrowings() : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  + getAllBorrowingsThatAreOverdue() : ArrayList<Borrowing>
  --
  + isBorrowingOverdue(borrowing : Borrowing) : boolean
  --
  + extendBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
  + returnBookAndEndBorrowing(borrowing : Borrowing) : void
  + borrowBookToPerson(person : Person, book : Book) : void
  --
  + toString() : String
}

class Borrowing {
  o id : int
  o book : Book
  o person : Person
  o borrowed_since : DateTime
  o borrowed_until : DateTime
  --
  + init() : int
  + getBook() : Book
  + getPerson() : Person
  + getBorrowedSince() : DateTime
  + getBorrowedUntil() : DateTime
  --
  + setBorrowedUntil() : void
  --
  + toString() : String
  + Borrowing(id : int, book : Book, person : Person, borrowed_since : DateTime, borrowed_until : DateTime)
}

class DateTime {
  o daysInMonths : int[]
  o day : int
  o month : EMonth
  o year : int
  o hour : int
  o minutes : int
  o seconds : int
  --
  + DateTime(day : int, month : EMonth, year : int)
  + DateTime(day : int, month : EMonth, year : int, hour : int)
  + DateTime(day : int, month : EMonth, year : int, hour : int, minutes : int, seconds : int)
  + DateTime(day : int, month : int, year : int, hour : int, minutes : int, seconds : int)
  --
  + getDay() : int
  + getMonth() : EMonth
  + getYear() : int
  + getHour() : int
  + getMinutes() : int
  + getSeconds() : int
  --
  + setDay(day : int) : void
  + setMonth(month : EMonth) : void
  + setYear(year : int) : void
  + setHour(hour : int) : void
  + setMinutes(minutes : int) : void
  + setSeconds(seconds : int) : void
  --
  + addDays(days : int) : void
  + getDateTimeInSecondsSince1970() : double
  --
  + copy() : DateTime
  + toString() : String
}

enum EMonth {
  JANUARY
  FEBRUARY
  MARCH
  APRIL
  MAY
  JUNE
  JULY
  AUGUST
  SEPTEMBER
  OCTOBER
  NOVEMBER
  DECEMBER
  --
  + getFromEMonth(month : EMonth) : int «static»
  + getEMonthFromInt(month : int) : EMonth «static»
}

class Book {
  o author : Person
  o title : String
  o publisher : String
  o isbn : String
  --
  + Book(author : Person, title : String, publisher : String, isbn : String)
  --
  + getAuthor() : Person
  + getTitle() : String
  + getPublisher() : String
  + getISBN() : String
  --
  + toString() : String
}

class Person {
  o name : String
  o surname : String
  o phone_numbers : ArrayList<Integer>
  o emails : ArrayList<String>
  o penalties : ArrayList<Penalty>
  --
  + PersonName(String, surname : String)
  + PersonName(String, surname : String, phone_number : int)
  + PersonName(String, surname : String, String, email : String)
  + PersonName(String, surname : String, String, phone_number : int, email : String)
  --
  + getName() : String
  + getSurname() : String
  + getFullName() : String
  + getPhoneNumber() : ArrayList<Integer>
  + getEmail() : ArrayList<String>
  + getPenalties() : ArrayList<Penalty>
  --
  + setName(name : String) : void
  + setSurname(surname : String) : void
  + addPhone(phone_number : String) : void
  + addMail(email : String) : void
  + addPhoneNumber(phone_numbers : ArrayList<Integer>) : void
  + addEmails(emails : ArrayList<String>) : void
  + addPenalty(penalty : Penalty) : void
  --
  + toString() : String
}

class Penalty {
  o Description : String
  o Penaltydescription : String
  --
  + getDescription() : String
  --
  + toString() : String
}

class IOSingleton {
  o instance : IOSingleton «static»
  o idCounter : int «static»
  --
  + IOSingleton()
  --
  + getInstance() : IOSingleton «static»
  + toString() : String
  + getId() : int
}

Library --> Borrowing
Library --> Book
Library --> Person
Library --> Penalty
Borrowing --> Book
Borrowing --> Person
Borrowing --> DateTime
Book --> Person
Person --> Penalty
DateTime --> EMonth

@enduml
```
